business.name: Hawthorne & Co.
business.description: Licensed, insured, and family-run since 2009. From middle-of-the-night emergencies to full repipes, Hawthorne & Co. brings honest pricing and clean, careful work to homes across greater Nashville.

services.title: Emergency Repairs
services.blurb: Burst pipes, major leaks, no hot water — same-day response, 24 hours a day.

services.title: Drain & Sewer Cleaning
services.blurb: Camera diagnostics, hydro-jetting, and root removal that actually lasts.

services.title: Water Heaters
services.blurb: Tank and tankless installs, repairs, and same-week replacements.

services.title: Repiping & Remodels
services.blurb: Whole-home repipes and clean rough-ins for kitchens and bathrooms.

services.title: Fixtures & Faucets
services.blurb: Faucets, toilets, disposals, and water filtration — installed right.

services.title: Inspections & Maintenance
services.blurb: Pre-purchase inspections and annual tune-ups that catch problems early.

items.author: Jenna R.
items.body: Woke up to water all over the kitchen floor. Marcus had someone out within the hour, found the slab leak, and walked me through every option with zero pressure. Fair price, spotless work.

items.author: David M.
items.body: Tankless install in an older East Nashville home — not a simple job. The crew was on time, tidy, and clearly knew what they were doing. The quote matched the final bill to the dollar.

items.author: Priya S.
items.body: Three other plumbers quoted me a full repipe. Hawthorne found it was one bad section, fixed it for a fraction, and never tried to upsell. Honest people — I won't call anyone else.

items.author: Tom B.
items.body: Used them for a bathroom remodel rough-in. Communicative, licensed, and the inspection passed first try. Already booked them for my rental property.

process.title: Call or request
process.body: Tell us what's going on. You'll get a real arrival window and a straight answer — no runaround, no call center.

process.title: Upfront estimate
process.body: We diagnose on-site and quote the full price before any work begins. You approve it first. No surprises on the invoice.

process.title: Clean, careful work
process.body: Licensed plumbers, drop cloths down, shoes covered. We treat your home like ours and leave it cleaner than we found it.

process.title: Stand behind it
process.body: Every repair is guaranteed in writing. If something isn't right, we come back and make it right — no argument.

faq.a: Yes. We answer calls 24/7 for burst pipes, major leaks, and no-hot-water emergencies across greater Nashville — usually with same-day response.
Absolutely. Hawthorne & Co. is a licensed TN Master Plumber (#12345) and fully insured. We're happy to show proof of both on request.
Diagnostic visits are a flat rate, credited toward the repair if you move forward. You'll always approve the full price before we start any work.
Nashville and the surrounding communities — East Nashville, Franklin, Brentwood, Hendersonville, Mt. Juliet, Murfreesboro, and more.
Every job is backed by a written workmanship guarantee, on top of the manufacturer warranties on the parts and fixtures we install.

faq.q: How soon can you come out?
faq.a: Most non-emergency calls are scheduled within 1–2 days; true emergencies are same-day. Call (615) 555-0142 for the next available window.

paragraphs: Hawthorne & Co. started in 2009 with one truck, one master plumber, and a simple promise: tell people the truth and do the job right the first time.
Fifteen years later we're still family-run. We've grown by word of mouth — homeowners who were treated fairly telling their neighbors — not by chasing the cheapest bid or the biggest upsell.

Every plumber on our team is licensed, background-checked, and trained to leave your home cleaner than they found it. That's the standard Marcus holds, and it's why most of our work comes from repeat customers.
